nasb.text: When Boaz had eaten and drunk and his heart was merry, he went to lie down at the end of the heap of grain; and she came secretly, and uncovered his feet and lay down.

esv.text: And when Boaz had eaten and drunk, and his heart was merry, he went to lie down at the end of the heap of grain. Then she came softly and uncovered his feet and lay down.

cnv.text: 波阿斯吃喝完了，心裡舒暢，就去躺在麥堆的旁邊。路得悄悄地來，掀露他的腳，躺臥下去。

ccb.text: 波阿斯吃过晚饭，心里舒畅，便躺在麦堆旁边睡着了。路得悄悄过去掀起盖在他脚上的被，躺在他脚旁。

csbs.text: 波阿斯吃喝完了，心里畅快，就去躺在麦堆边。路得悄悄地去掀开他脚上的遮盖，然后躺下来。
